|desc=The {{p|Revavroom|Schedar Starmobile}} was first seen alongside Mela as the latter talked to {{Scarlet}}. It was later used to battle {{Violet}} when he raided the [[Schedar Squad's Base]]. It managed to take out Violet's {{p|Clodsire}} before being taken out by his {{p|Crocalor}}'s super effective {{m|Stomping Tantrum}}.

Revavroom's known moves are {{m|Blazing Torque}} and {{m|Screech}}, and its Ability is {{a|Speed Boost}}.}}
